hooks.command: if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" inject; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-spawning; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" turn-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')); process.exit(c.map?.enabled && c.sessionlog?.sync && c.sessionlog.sync!=='off' ? 0 : 1)" 2>/dev/null; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/map-hook.mjs" sessionlog-sync; fi
